correction.rationale: No correction is needed; the existing mask adequately segments the visible right foot base.

judgments.evidence: The candidate matches the character-right foot identified by the COCO semantic chain and covers the full visible target within the ROI with a clean, plausible silhouette boundary.

observations.contour: The cyan contour is anatomically plausible and tracks the visible silhouette. The flat upper segment corresponds to the crop-visible ankle transition rather than an erroneous extension into hidden anatomy.
observations.full_context: The foreground foot is the character's right foot according to the semantic pose-chain evidence; it is the visible foot enclosed by the cyan ROI and is distinct from the crossed rear foot.
observations.mask: The binary mask covers the visible foot base continuously, including the instep, heel-side edge, forefoot, and toes, without apparent holes or disconnected components.
observations.neighbor_overlap: No meaningful overlap with the crossed rear foot or other neighboring body part is visible; the mask is confined to the foreground right foot.
observations.overlay: The red overlay aligns closely with the visible foot pixels; the boundary follows the ankle transition, dorsal edge, plantar edge, and toe contours with no meaningful spill into the background or rear foot.
observations.source_crop: The crop shows a complete visible right foot base from the ankle transition through the toes, with clear skin-background boundaries and no clothing in the target region.

correction.rationale: Mask boundary, coverage, and side assignment are correct and consistent with pose-chain evidence and visible pixels; no correction needed.

judgments.evidence: The mask corresponds to the character's right foot per COCO pose-chain nearest-distance evidence, fully covers the visible foot region (ankle joint to toes) with a tight, anatomically plausible boundary and no contamination from background, clothing, or the neighboring leg.

observations.contour: White contour line tracks the foot outline accurately, including the ankle bone bump, top ridge notch, and toe tips; no visible leakage onto background or onto the other leg.
observations.full_context: Cyan ROI box tightly bounds the forward-most foot at the bottom of the image; pose-chain evidence confirms this foot (centroid ~1102,5262) is nearest the right ankle/knee/hip chain (263px) vs left chain (788px), so this is the character's right foot despite screen-left position from crossed legs.
observations.mask: Binary mask is a single solid blob shaped like the foot with a small stepped notch at the top matching the ankle-shin junction; no holes or stray fragments.
observations.neighbor_overlap: No overlap markers or bleed onto the adjacent leg/ankle visible in this crop; the boundary stops cleanly at the ankle joint without extending into calf or other leg.
observations.overlay: Red overlay aligns closely with the foot silhouette in the source crop, covering ankle through toes with edges hugging the skin boundary, including toe separations and nail area.
observations.source_crop: High-res crop shows a complete foot from ankle to toe tips, standing on floor, viewed from a side/three-quarter angle with visible sole edge, top-of-foot tendons, and toenails.
